series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains the following information on state funded poison prevention treatment centers; Application for Designation, Designation Review Criteria, Treatment Site Review Check List Statistical Reports, Outreach Activity Report, Special Co

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 2 years after hard copy is destroyed, then destroy ; Paper: Retain for 3 years, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
